uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds latitude frame. Bytes 4-7 (0x01F99CC0) decode to 33.135808 deg; angles bytes 8-10 are signed degrees. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (source of truth) and mapping Latitude->position.latitude, Volt->battery, AngleX/Y/Z->angleX/angleY/angleZ.

uplink.description: Longitude report (reportType 0x02) with HDOP and altitude
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds longitude frame. Bytes 4-7 (0xFA2EFACF) decode via two's-complement to -97.584433 deg; bytes 9-10 (0x01F4) to altitude 500 m. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (source of truth) and mapping Longitude->position.longitude, Volt->battery, HDop->hdop, AltitudeGPS->altitude.

uplink.description: Latitude report with low-battery flag set
uplink._note: Synthetic frame: byte3 high bit (0xA4 = 0x80|0x24) flags low battery while still encoding 3.6 V, matching upstream's '(low battery)' suffix on Volt. Surfaced as the camelCase extra lowBattery.
Upstream example input; upstream emits Device/SWver/HWver/Datecode, none of which are measurements, so we report an error.
Upstream example input; the 0xFFFFFFFF coordinate is the device's no-fix sentinel (upstream stringifies it as '0xFFFFFFFF'), so no position is decoded.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 is unsupported
uplink._note: Upstream example input; fPort 7 carries config/command responses, not measurements.
